what_it_does: Declares a TypeScript triple-slash reference directive to pull in Vite client ambient types for the surface app module.
observations: Single-line triple-slash directive referencing vite/client types
Contains no explicit code symbols or declarations
File extension .d.ts indicates an ambient type declaration file
standouts: Uses the Vite-specific client type reference directive
conventions: Follows the Vite convention of using vite-env.d.ts for client type augmentation
Uses the triple-slash reference types directive
notes: Ambient Vite client type reference file for the surface app, enabling Vite-specific globals and import.meta.env types in TypeScript.
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file's purpose is to include Vite client ambient types, which the directive accomplishes.
intention_signals: Signals that this package is built with Vite and wants the Vite client environment types available to TypeScript.
contribution: Provides the Vite client ambient type reference for the surface app, allowing TypeScript to recognize Vite-specific globals and environment variables without duplicating type definitions.
summary_for_embedding: A Vite ambient type declaration file containing a triple-slash reference to vite/client types for the surface application.
intention_for_embedding: To enable Vite client type support in the surface app's TypeScript compilation.
